violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. Raw chicken was stored next to and touching boxes of raw Chislic in the walk in cooler.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. The top of the drawer cooler under the flat grill needs to be cleaned. The fan in the dish area needs to be cleaned. Underneath the cutting board of the salad cooler needs to be cleaned.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not provided in sufficient number and/or not accessible to allow convenient use by employees. A bucket was stored in the hand sink in the bar area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The wall above the counter oven and shelves in the kitchen need to be cleaned. The floors by the back door need to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. The concrete floor by the ice machine is broken.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Wet cloth was stored on the prep counter. Wet cloths were on the counter by the counter top oven. These were not stored in sanitizer.

Thawing potentially hazardous food. — --Potentially hazardous food was not thawed in an approved manner. Pouches of cut meat were being thawed in water on the prep counter, no running water. The water was 70.1 degrees.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. Plastic food containers on the shelf by the meat slicer were not inverted.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. The paper towel dispenser for the hand sink by the Mulligans kitchen was not working.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The floor under the metal shelves in the walk in cooler needs to be cleaned. These floor in the walk in freezer needs to be cleaned.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
